case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. ANN DARSKY et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DARSKY, ANN $2,646.87 PRINCIPAL, $291.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,937.87, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
